notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler grounds into a double play, shortstop Nicky Lopez to first baseman Jake Burger. Kevin McGonigle out at 2nd. Dillon Dingler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Robby Ahlstrom. Kevin McGonigle scores. Dillon Dingler to 3rd. Kerry Carpenter to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Hao-Yu Lee pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Hao-Yu Lee pops out to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Hao-Yu Lee pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Hao-Yu Lee pops out to third baseman Ezequiel Duran in foul territory.

notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Osuna flies out to right fielder Matt Vierling.
